prompt: Compare messages MSG-6752 and MSG-9752; report each name, send date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. After the correction, answer in exactly three bullets: target ID, corrected send date, and “Notification sent: no”.

follow_up_turns.content: For Workshop waitlist note (MSG-6752) only, set the send date to 2026-11-27. Leave MSG-9752 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for MSG-6752: set the send date to 2026-12-13, not 2026-11-27. The other message must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first send date.
Replace the superseded send date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both send date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected send date as current and the first requested send date as superseded.
The final response must contain exactly three bullets in this order: target ID; corrected send date; “Notification sent: no”.
